title: matricaria sevanensis
intro: Matricaria sevanensis, also known as Caucasian chamomile, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae), native to the Caucasus region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and soothing effects. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, promote relaxation, and alleviate digestive issues such as insomnia, restlessness, and menstrual cramps. Matricaria sevanensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support overall well-being and provide relief from various health concerns.
